decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id project_34th-st-sbs-2012 already matches the canonical registry record for 34th Street Select Bus Service. The observation's source (201110_brt_34th_open_house_slides) is already in that record's source_ids, and its alias project_34th-st-sbs-201110-open-house confirms the mapping. No different target_record_id applies — the observation already resolves to its own base.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 34 th Street SBS Fall 2011 Open Houses
2011 planned improvements – Off-board fare collection – Bus lane camera enforcement • 2012 proposed design – Offset bus lanes – Bus bulbs and sidewalk extensions – Expanded loading zones

proposed_relations.description: project_34th-street-2011 (34th Street Project, planning phase) and project_34th-st-sbs-2012 (34th Street Select Bus Service, design-and-construction phase) describe the same corridor initiative on 34th Street from Twelfth to First Avenue, sharing identical treatment elements: offset bus lanes, bus bulbs, sidewalk extensions, off-board fare collection, bus lane camera enforcement, and expanded loading zones.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 2011 planned improvements – Off-board fare collection – Bus lane camera enforcement • 2012 proposed design – Offset bus lanes – Bus bulbs and sidewalk extensions – Expanded loading zones
